title: Surah Ar-Rahman - Salim Bahanan | Calming Quran Recitation with Toy Factory Animation
description_template:
Welcome to $channel_name!

In today's video, we bring you a heart-soothing recitation of $surah_name by $reciter. To make this experience engaging for children and families, we have paired the beautiful verses with colorful 3D animations from the $visual_source world.

This video is perfect for:
- Background listening during playtime or rest.
- Helping children familiarize themselves with the sound of the Quran.
